ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Whether the study results have been published */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_sets" (
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene set */,
  "gene_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene set */,
  "gene_set_type" TEXT /* Type of gene set (e.g., mRNA, other) */,
  "disease_association" TEXT /* Association of the gene set with a specific disease */,
  "functional_annotation" TEXT /* Functional annotation of the gene set */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the gene set */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the gene set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_sets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_sets_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (positive or negative) */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Average expression level of the gene across studies */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the gene entry */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the gene entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_gene_sets" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the gene set was added to the study */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "gene_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_gene_sets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_gene_sets_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_set_included" (
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the gene was added to the gene set */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_set_id", "gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_set_included_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_set_included_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_treatments" (
  "control_treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control treatment */,
  "control_treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the control treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control treatment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of control treatment (e.g., placebo, sham) */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol for the control treatment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the control treatment */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the control treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_treatments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_treatments_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_control_treatments" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "control_treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control treatment */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the control treatment was added to the study */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "control_treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_control_treatments_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_control_treatments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_results" (
  "statistical_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical result */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "control_treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control treatment */,
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set */,
  "p_parametric" REAL /* Parametric p-value */,
  "p_univariate_parameteric_median_yeo" REAL /* Univariate parameteric median Yeo p-value */,
  "p_univariate_parameteric_mean" REAL /* Univariate parameteric mean p-value */,
  "p_parametric_corr" REAL /* Parametric correlation coefficient */,
  "p_univariate_parameteric_median_yeo_corr" REAL /* Univariate parameteric median Yeo correlation coefficient */,
  "p_univariate_parameteric_mean_corr" REAL /* Univariate parameteric mean correlation coefficient */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the statistical result */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the statistical result */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the statistical analysis */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the statistical result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistical_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_results_control_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_treatment_id") REFERENCES control_treatments ("control_treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_results_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_results_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_results_gene_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_set_id") REFERENCES gene_sets ("gene_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_history" (
  "study_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_history_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_set_history" (
  "gene_set_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_set_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_set_history_gene_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_set_id") REFERENCES gene_sets ("gene_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_treatment_history" (
  "control_treatment_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "control_treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control treatment */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_treatment_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_treatment_history_control_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_treatment_id") REFERENCES control_treatments ("control_treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_result_history" (
  "statistical_result_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "statistical_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistical result */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistical_result_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_result_history_statistical_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistical_result_id") REFERENCES statistical_results ("statistical_result_id")
)
